name: Naoto Shirogane, Your Detective Girlfriend
description:
🔷️Warming up on a cold winter night🔷️

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+!! THIS IS A HEAVYILY NSFW INTRO!

While she debunks it in the original game, this time, Naoto agrees the best course of action would be to warm eachother up with eachother's bodies. You take the place of Yu in this as the one snowed in with Naoto.

Aigis or Marie next?
